title: Girlfriend
why_this_song: Girlfriend by Avril Lavigne (2007) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "I don't like your girlfriend"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I think you need a new one"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I know that you like me"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I don't like your girlfriend"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I want to be your girlfriend"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "girlfriend" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "girlfriend" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "think" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "think" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: I think you need a new one

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Girlfriend" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Girlfriend"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Avril Lavigne one question about "Girlfriend", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Avril Lavigne sobre "Girlfriend", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Girlfriend" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Girlfriend" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
